title: Volume of Cylinder Calculator - Free Tool
description: Free volume of cylinder calculator. Calculate cylinder volume, surface area, and lateral area from radius and height. Step-by-step formula included.
keywords: volume of cylinder calculator, cylinder volume formula, cylinder calculator, surface area cylinder, cylinder dimensions
intro: Calculate the volume and surface area of a cylinder. Enter the radius and height to get instant results.

faq.q: What is the formula for volume of a cylinder?
faq.a: Volume = π × r² × h, where r is the radius and h is the height.

faq.q: How do I calculate surface area of a cylinder?
faq.a: Total surface area = 2πr² + 2πrh (two circular bases + lateral surface).
Lateral area = 2πrh. It's the area of the curved surface only, excluding the top and bottom circles.
